pr.title: gr: fix Zebes Route param store
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: PR #2502 updates the Zebes Route stage source to model grZe_Route_804D6A60 as an 8-byte parameter-store object instead of a direct pointer to an anonymous two-int struct, names two understood route parameters, and reports .sbss/data-section improvement for grzebesroute.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; adds Zebes Route parameter structs, changes grZe_Route_804D6A60 storage shape, and updates call sites to access named params through the store.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grzebesroute.c added 15 deleted 8 hunks 5
raw_diff: typedef grZebesRoute_Params and grZebesRoute_ParamStore added
raw_diff: grZe_Route_804D6A60 changed from anonymous struct pointer to grZebesRoute_ParamStore
raw_diff: call sites changed to params->zako_spawn_chance and params->camera_timer

what_changed: Added grZebesRoute_Params with fields camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance.
Added grZebesRoute_ParamStore containing grZebesRoute_Params* params and u32 pad, matching the PR body's description of an 8-byte param store.
Changed grZe_Route_804D6A60 from a direct pointer to an anonymous two-int struct into a grZebesRoute_ParamStore object.
Stored Ground_801C49F8() into grZe_Route_804D6A60.params instead of assigning it directly to grZe_Route_804D6A60.
Replaced anonymous x4 accesses in grZebesRoute_8020B1F4 with params->zako_spawn_chance for the HSD_Randi spawn-chance logic.
Replaced anonymous x0 access in grZebesRoute_8020B3C0 with params->camera_timer when assigning gp->gv.zebes2.xC4.
PR body reports grzebesroute data sections, including .sbss, are now 100%; bot report specifically shows main/melee/gr/grzebesroute .sbss improved from 50.00% to 100.00% with +4 bytes matched.
smart_moves: Modeled storage shape separately from pointed-to route parameters: grZe_Route_804D6A60 became a store object with a params pointer rather than pretending the symbol itself was the params pointer.
Named only the two route parameters called out as currently understood by the PR evidence: camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance.
Kept the remaining store padding as u32 pad rather than inventing a semantic field for the second word of the 8-byte store.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a stage data symbol is actually a small store containing a pointer, model the store separately from the pointed-to params instead of forcing all accesses through a direct pointer type.
evidence_refs: PR body: model grZe_Route_804D6A60 as the 8-byte Zebes Route param store
raw_diff: grZebesRoute_ParamStore contains grZebesRoute_Params* params and u32 pad
raw_diff: grZe_Route_804D6A60.params = Ground_801C49F8()

decomp_lessons.lesson: Use named parameter fields when call-site behavior supports them, while leaving unknown storage as padding or address-style names.
evidence_refs: PR body: name currently understood route params camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance
raw_diff: x4 replaced by zako_spawn_chance in HSD_Randi logic
raw_diff: x0 replaced by camera_timer for gp->gv.zebes2.xC4 assignment

accepted_candidate_records.title: Model small stage parameter stores as stores, not direct params pointers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2502 shows grZe_Route_804D6A60 modeled as an 8-byte Zebes Route ParamStore containing a params pointer and padding; call sites then access grZe_Route_804D6A60.params->camera_timer and ->zako_spawn_chance. Candidate lesson: when data-section evidence shows a small store object around a params pointer, recover that wrapper rather than using a direct anonymous pointer.
evidence_refs: PR #2502 body summary
raw_diff grZebesRoute_ParamStore
bot report .sbss 50.00% to 100.00%

accepted_candidate_records.title: Name only currently understood route params; leave unknown store word as pad
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR names camera_timer and zako_spawn_chance based on understood route usage and leaves the extra store word as u32 pad. Candidate naming practice: semantic field names are appropriate where call-site behavior supports them, while unknown words should remain padding/neutral.
evidence_refs: PR #2502 body summary
raw_diff field replacements

rejection_notes: Do not generalize that all Ground_801C49F8 returns use an 8-byte param store; the slice only supports Zebes Route/grZe_Route_804D6A60.
Do not claim grZebesRoute_8020B548 matched; PR notes say it remains 99.96923%, not fully matched.
Do not treat the author's verification commands as full reproduced validation logs; they are reported commands, with only the bot .sbss report included in the slice.
No reviewer intent or requested changes can be inferred because there are no loaded review comments.
